pageContext.name: Binah: Of Flowing Mind
pageContext.description: Sideshow presents the Binah: Of Flowing Mind Fine Art Print, a surreal original fantasy artwork by Peter Mohrbacher. Part of his original Angelarium series, this peaceful portrait honors the third Emanation of the Tree of Life, Binah.  From the mind of Peter Mohrbacher, the Angelarium project has grown into an artistic anthology of designs inspired by numerous named angels throughout mythology. The Binah: Of Flowing Mind Fine Art Print depicts this angel deep in thought, her mind open and yielding to the flow of knowledge. Smiling, with her eyes closed in bliss, she receives this river and channels that energy to the rest of the world. Thus Binah is a being of creation and intention who gives potential to humanity.  This serene illustration is now being offered to fans in a high-end, museum quality print format for the first time in collaboration with Sideshow Art Prints. Each Binah: Of Flowing Mind Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Angelarium logo in the margin as part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée and in a custom framed presentation, this tranquil fantasy artwork makes a truly unique addition to any collection, especially alongside other Angelarium art prints.  Bring enlightenment into your life today with the Binah: Of Flowing Mind Fine Art Print by Peter Mohrbacher.
